task_completion.description: The 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open and the 'sample_order_lines2023' dataset is visible in the Data Elements panel.

task_completion.description: A custom group named 'Business Type' is created with the correct groupings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom group or column named 'Business Type' is visible in the Data Elements panel or a grouping dialog, showing 'Commercial' (combining Corporate and Home Office) and 'Consumer'.

task_completion.description: A Donut Chart visualization is created on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Donut Chart visualization is clearly visible on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: The Donut Chart uses 'Business Type' for categories and 'Revenue' for values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization grammar/properties panel shows 'Business Type' assigned to the Category/Color role, and 'Revenue' assigned to the Values role.

task_completion.description: The Donut Chart is titled 'Revenue by Business Type'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the Donut Chart on the canvas is exactly 'Revenue by Business Type'.
The workbook name 'Segment_Grouping_Analysis' is visible in the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or in a save dialog/confirmation.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface, such as clicking menus, dragging columns, or using dialog boxes, rather than running terminal commands.

integrity.description: The chart is generated natively within Oracle Analytics Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Donut Chart is rendered inside the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas with its native UI elements, not as a static image opened in a browser or image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the .dva file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) open with code representing the .dva file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is 'Segment_Grouping_Analysis.dva'. The dataset contains a 'Customer Segment' column. The new custom group must be named 'Business Type' with 'Commercial' (Corporate + Home Office) and 'Consumer' (Consumer). The chart must be a Donut Chart titled 'Revenue by Business Type', using 'Business Type' for categories and 'Revenue' for values.
